description: Flash flood warning in a populated urban area — moderate severity, clear evacuation path

properties.headline: Flash Flood Warning issued for Downtown Sacramento until 8:00 PM PDT
properties.areaDesc: Downtown Sacramento; Midtown Sacramento; Land Park
properties.description: AT 2 PM PDT, emergency management reported heavy rainfall producing flash flooding in downtown Sacramento. Water levels are rising rapidly in low-lying areas near the American River. Numerous roads are flooded and impassable.
properties.instruction: Move immediately to higher ground. Do not attempt to drive through flooded roads. Turn Around Don't Drown. Call 911 if in immediate danger.

NWSheadline: FLASH FLOOD WARNING IN EFFECT UNTIL 8 PM PDT THIS EVENING

demo_voice_prompt: Are there any active flood alerts near my home?
expected_agent_response: Yes — there is an active Flash Flood Warning for Downtown Sacramento until 8 PM tonight. Flooding is occurring now near the American River. You should move to higher ground and avoid driving. Shall I open the official evacuation guidance?
